input.command:
kubectl get storageclass
echo "---pvc describe---"
kubectl describe pvc spark-history-pvc -n spark-history | tail -15
echo "---deployment volumes---"
kubectl get deployment spark-history-server -n spark-history -o yaml | grep -A20 "volumes:"
echo "---deployment env---"
kubectl get deployment spark-history-server -n spark-history -o yaml | grep -B2 -A10 "env:"

content.content:
NAME                 PROVISIONER             RECLAIMPOLICY   VOLUMEBINDINGMODE      ALLOWVOLUMEEXPANSION   AGE
standard (default)   rancher.io/local-path   Delete          WaitForFirstConsumer   false                  24d
---pvc describe---
Namespace:     spark-history
StorageClass:  standard
Status:        Pending
Volume:        
Labels:        <none>
Annotations:   <none>
Finalizers:    [kubernetes.io/pvc-protection]
Capacity:      
Access Modes:  
VolumeMode:    Filesystem
Used By:       <none>
Events:
  Type    Reason                Age                   From                         Message
  ----    ------                ----                  ----                         -------
  Normal  WaitForFirstConsumer  10s (x15 over 3m35s)  persistentvolume-controller  waiting for first consumer to be created before binding
---deployment volumes---
      volumes:
      - name: spark-logs
        persistentVolumeClaim:
          claimName: spark-history-pvc-wrong
status:
  conditions:
  - lastTransitionTime: "2026-07-09T23:23:41Z"
    lastUpdateTime: "2026-07-09T23:23:41Z"
    message: Deployment does not have minimum availability.
    reason: MinimumReplicasUnavailable
    status: "False"
    type: Available
  - lastTransitionTime: "2026-07-09T23:23:40Z"
    lastUpdateTime: "2026-07-09T23:23:41Z"
    message: ReplicaSet "spark-history-server-748fd9b7f7" is progressing.
    reason: ReplicaSetUpdated
    status: "True"
    type: Progressing
  observedGeneration: 1
  replicas: 1
  unavailableReplicas: 1
---deployment env---
        - /opt/spark/bin/spark-class
        - org.apache.spark.deploy.history.HistoryServer
        env:
        - name: SPARK_HISTORY_OPTS
          value: -Dspark.history.fs.logDirectory=/wrong/path/spark-logs -Dspark.history.fs.update.interval=5s
            -Dspark.history.ui.port=18080
        - name: SPARK_NO_DAEMONIZE
          value: "true"
        image: apache/spark:3.5.3
        imagePullPolicy: IfNotPresent
        name: spark-history-server
        ports:
        - containerPort: 18080

input.command:
set -e
echo "=== Fix Team A RoleBinding ==="
kubectl patch rolebinding spark-role-binding -n spark-team-a --type=json \
  -p='[{"op": "replace", "path": "/subjects/0/namespace", "value": "spark-team-a"}]'

echo "=== Fix History Server PVC reference ==="
kubectl patch deployment spark-history-server -n spark-history --type=json \
  -p='[{"op": "replace", "path": "/spec/template/spec/volumes/0/persistentVolumeClaim/claimName", "value": "spark-history-pvc"}]'

echo "=== Fix History Server log directory ==="
kubectl set env deployment/spark-history-server -n spark-history \
  SPARK_HISTORY_OPTS="-Dspark.history.fs.logDirectory=/mnt/spark-logs -Dspark.history.fs.update.interval=5s -Dspark.history.ui.port=18080"

echo "=== Fix History Server log directory ==="

  SPARK_HISTORY_OPTS="-Dspark.history.fs.logDirectory=/mnt/spark-logs -Dspark.history.fs.update.interval=5s -Dspark.history.ui.port=18080"

echo "=== Fix History Server log directory ==="

=== Fix History Server PVC reference ===

deployment.apps/spark-history-server env updated
